title: Vanplay Montessori Toys for 1 Year Old, 6 in 1 Baby Tissue Box Toy Wooden Activity Cube, Shape Sorter Sensory Toys for Babies 12 Months, 1st Birthday Gifts for Girls Boys
features: [6 IN 1 Montessori Toys] This interactive toy includes, Baby Sensory Toy Wooden Activity Cube Box, contains 6 panels, 10 soft tissues, 1 crinkled tissue, 6 worms, 8 carrots, 3 animal shape building blocks and 1 fishing rod. Each element allows your child to explore endless fun.

[Multidimensional Sensory Toy] This sensory baby tissue box toy integrates six educational modules, including clock recognition, animal matching, and magnetic challenge. It stimulates the baby's time perception, shape recognition, and logical thinking through interactive baby games, and implements the Montessori education concept in a fun way.

[Wooden Toys with Exquisite Craftsmanship] The wooden baby toys are made of natural high-quality wood and water-based paint. It is strictly polished to remove burrs, and the magnetic accessories are firm. Parents can let their children explore and learn with peace of mind.

[Interactive Toys] Each game has its own unique educational significance. This Montessori toys combines the theme of farm animals. Children can touch and play with their hands to improve their fine motor control and stimulate sensory integration development in multiple dimensions.

[Gifts for Kids] This perfect gift for girls boys 1 2 3 year old will impress as a birthday gift or Christmas gift. Our versatile 6-in-1 wooden Montessori toys are both educational and practical. Accompany your child's multi-stage development with one set of Montessori toys.
